judge_reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text for stamps and addresses that Description A does not see at all, and they disagree on whether text is 'handwritten and stamped' (A) versus 'handwritten and typed' (B).
original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of the front of a dark-colored envelope. The envelope has handwritten and stamped text in white ink. Postage stamps are affixed to the top right corner. The address is in formal cursive script.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A dark envelope or cover page with handwritten Spanish address text, two pairs of Mexican postage stamps with circular postmarks in the upper right, and large cursive addressing to “Presidente de la Comisión de Investigación Científica de Estados Unidos de Norte America,” with “Nueva York” written at the lower right.*
